code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Generate a fluent, concise sentence from a list of triples."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Detect if any runway length is expressed in feet – use this to choose default units
    feet_units = any("Feet" in t.predicate for t in triples)

    # Mapping from predicate to a phrase generator (object -> phrase)
    phrase_map = {
        # Airport‑specific
        "cityServed": lambda o: f"serves the city of {o}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} {'feet' if feet_units else 'metres'} above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level",
        "location": lambda o: f"is located in {o}",
        "operatingOrganisation": lambda o: f"is operated by {o}",
        "runwayLength": lambda o: f"has a runway length of {o} metres",
        "runwayName": lambda o: f"has a runway named {o}",
        "country": lambda o: f"is in {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda o: f"is part of {o}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has ICAO code {o}",
        "locationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has location identifier {o}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has IATA code {o}",
        "nativeName": lambda o: f"is also known as {o}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"has runway surface {o}",
        # Geopolitical
        "leaderParty": lambda o: f"is associated with the {o} party",
        "capital": lambda o: f"has {o} as its capital",
        "language": lambda o: f"speaks {o.replace(' language','').replace(' languages','')}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda o: f"has official language {o}",
        "leader": lambda o: f"is led by {o}",
        "mayor": lambda o: f"has mayor {o}",
        "owner": lambda o:

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

  def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
      """Generate a readable sentence from a list of triples."""
      if not triples:
          return ""
  
      parts: list[str] = []
      for t in triples:
          s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object
  
          # Specific phrasing for common airport predicates
          if p == "cityServed":
              parts.append(f"{s} serves the city of {o}")
          elif p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel":
              # Don't assume units - let the data speak for itself
              if not any(unit in str(o).lower() for unit in ['metre', 'meter', 'm', 'foot', 'feet',...
                  parts.append(f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} above sea level")
              else:
                  parts.append(f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} above sea level")
          elif p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
              parts.append(f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} feet above sea level")
          elif p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres":
              parts.append(f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level")
          elif p == "location":
              parts.append(f"{s} is located in {o}")
